description: Wazuh Security Monitoring Dashboard — connects directly to the Wazuh Indexer via the OpenSearch datasource plugin. Shows total alerts, severity breakdown, alert trend, top agents, top rules, security use-cases, IP enrichment, EPS metrics, and raw log explorer.

panels.description: Total number of alerts in the selected time range
panels.title: Total Alerts

targets.query: rule.level:[7 TO 11] AND agent.name:${agent:lucene} AND rule.groups:${rule_group:lucene}

panels.description: Number of unique agents that generated alerts in this time range
panels.title: Active Agents

panels.description: Number of unique rules that fired in this time range
panels.title: Unique Rules Fired

panels.description: Alerts per second (EPS) — event rate over time
panels.title: Avg Alerts / Min (EPS)

panels.description: Number of alerts over time, split by severity level group
panels.title: Alert Volume Over Time (by Severity)

targets.query: rule.level:[7 TO 11] AND agent.name:${agent:lucene} AND rule.groups:${rule_group:lucene}
rule.level:[4 TO 6] AND agent.name:${agent:lucene} AND rule.groups:${rule_group:lucene}
rule.level:[1 TO 3] AND agent.name:${agent:lucene} AND rule.groups:${rule_group:lucene}

panels.description: Alerts per minute trend (EPS). Shows the event rate over the selected time window.
panels.title: Alerts Per Minute (EPS Trend)

panels.description: The 10 agents that generated the most alerts in the selected time range
panels.title: Top 10 Agents by Alert Count

panels.description: Distribution of alerts by severity level across all agents
panels.title: Alerts by Severity

targets.query: rule.level:[7 TO 11] AND agent.name:${agent:lucene} AND rule.groups:${rule_group:lucene}
rule.level:[4 TO 6] AND agent.name:${agent:lucene} AND rule.groups:${rule_group:lucene}
rule.level:[1 TO 3] AND agent.name:${agent:lucene} AND rule.groups:${rule_group:lucene}

panels.description: Top rule groups that fired most often
panels.title: Top Rule Groups

panels.description: Authentication failure events over time — high spikes may indicate brute force attempts
panels.title: Authentication Failures Over Time

panels.description: Security-specific event counts by attack category
panels.title: Security Event Counters

panels.description: Top source IPs generating alerts — potential attackers or misconfigured hosts
panels.title: Top Attacking Source IPs

panels.description: Top countries from which attacks originate (based on GeoIP data)
panels.title: Top Attack Countries (GeoIP)

panels.description: Top 15 rules sorted by alert count. Shows rule ID, description, level, and total count.
panels.title: Top 15 Triggered Rules

panels.description: Top 10 agents with the most alerts, showing alert count per agent
panels.title: Top 10 Agents

panels.description: Live scrollable log view filtered by selected agent and rule group variables. Use the Lucene query to refine further. Predefined filter examples: rule.groups:authentication_failed | rule.groups:virus | rule.groups:web | agent.name:server-01
panels.title: Raw Alert Logs

title: Wazuh Security Overview - Fully Fixed V5
